title: Spider Diversity
description: Create more diversity on Spider (normal and cave spider)
body:
Texture Pack for 1.13+ - Optifine Required

This texture pack add multiple color variation for Spider texture...
It modifies color of normal and cave spiders, some version of Optifine support the eyes variations...

How it work?

Simple, you install the texture pack (ignore the warning if you using the 1.13+ version) then go on your game, spiders will be randomly colored.
It's only cosmetic, color of a spider don't affect the gameplay. Optifine is required with random texture ON
